description_long: This is a medium-sized, hardcover book with a slightly worn, off-white cover and visible signs of age along the edges. The front cover is plain, with only faint, gold-embossed Japanese text near the top, and no visible illustration or artwork. The spine is a light brown color, also featuring vertical Japanese text in a similar gold tone, and shows some creasing and wear. The back cover is unadorned and matches the front in its plain, off-white appearance. The book's pages appear to be yellowed, suggesting it is older or well-used. Overall, the book has a simple, utilitarian design with no decorative elements aside from the text.
description: A medium-sized, worn hardcover book with plain off-white covers and gold Japanese text, showing signs of age and no visible illustration.
description_view_0: The book is viewed from the side, showing the thickness of the pages and the slightly uneven, aged edges.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, featuring plain off-white color with faint gold Japanese text and no illustration.
description_view_2: The spine is shown, displaying vertical gold Japanese text on a light brown background with visible wear.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, plain and off-white with no text or illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light brown with vertical gold Japanese text and some visible wear. There are no decorative patterns or illustrations.
